name: agentgrid
description: Spawn a grid of AI coding agents in one command. Grid layouts, colored status labels, sound alerts.
author: naman10parikh

skills.name: agentgrid
skills.description: Create grids of AI coding agents with status indicators and sound alerts
skills.trigger: When user wants to run multiple agent sessions in parallel, create grid layouts, or manage multi-agent terminal workflows

skills.name: agentgrid-orchestrate
skills.description: Orchestrate missions across a running agentgrid — inject tasks, broadcast to all panes, monitor live status, and read pane output
skills.trigger: When user wants to send missions to panes, broadcast to all workers, monitor a running grid, or inject a task file

skills.name: agentgrid-sessions
skills.description: Save, restore, and manage agentgrid sessions and presets — persist grid layouts and replay company configurations
skills.trigger: When user wants to save a grid, restore a session, load a preset, or replay a company configuration
